steps.title: Identify the subject that needs agreement
steps.content: The blank is in the relative clause The radiation that [blank]... The subject is radiation, which is singular.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires the verb to match its subject's number, so occurs is the correct singular form. The other three options are all plural and violate this requirement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
